title: RBI (Commercial Banks Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Third Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI amended capital adequacy norms to align with updated provisioning standards. The changes clarify inclusion and exclusion of provisions in Tier 2 capital.
The post RBI (Commercial Banks Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Third Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
